description_long: This is a lifelike model of a green frog, featuring a smooth, glossy skin with a vibrant green coloration and darker green mottled patterns along its back and sides. The frog's body is robust and rounded, with muscular hind legs tucked beneath it, ready for jumping. Its front limbs are slender and splayed outward, ending in webbed toes that are pale in color. The head is broad with prominent, golden eyes set high on the sides, and the mouth is wide and slightly upturned. The underside of the frog is a lighter, almost white shade, contrasting with the vivid green of its dorsal surface. The overall appearance is naturalistic, capturing the typical features of a common urban-dwelling frog.
description: A realistic green frog with mottled patterns, glossy skin, and prominent golden eyes, posed in a crouched position with splayed limbs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad head, wide mouth, and splayed front limbs with pale webbed toes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the frog's rounded body, muscular hind leg, and golden eye.
description_view_2: Top view displaying the green mottled pattern along the back and the symmetry of the limbs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the body curve, leg position, and eye prominence.
